required_evidence: Measured physical reed length and width per V-DIM-04 and V-DIM-05 recorded in validation.csv for at least 3 candidate reeds
notes: Reed length and width are starter values from organological sources; promotion requires measured candidate-reed data

required_evidence: Stable fundamental oscillation on completed body with no squeaking across the full bridle range per V-ACOU-11; bench-test each candidate reed before drilling holes
notes: Reed natural frequency must exceed bore fundamental; reeds that fail sub-resonance test are discarded not adjusted

required_evidence: Measured L_reed_eff inferred from post-trim body length and fundamental pitch; recorded in validation.csv with reed ID
notes: The 0.5x physical reed length assumption is a starting estimate only; the calibrated value comes out of empirical body trim

required_evidence: Documented bridle position range producing stable tone at mf dynamic per V-ACOU-11 plus photo of installed bridle
notes: Bridle position is a setup variable not a fabrication dimension; do not infer reed cavity geometry from this gate

required_evidence: Three-point bore ID measurement at reed end midpoint and bell per V-DIM-01 recorded for the as-built body
notes: Bore ID is the design input; deviation must be checked before any hole position is promoted

required_evidence: Measured taper across body length not exceeding 0.010 inch per V-DIM-02 notes; circularity at three stations
notes: Slight taper exists in traditional instruments but is modeled here as cylinder; deviation affects harmonic balance and must be recorded

required_evidence: Final body length after empirical reed trim per V-DIM-03 plus measured fundamental within 5 cents of target per V-ACOU-01
notes: Body length is the calibrated output of reed fit not a precomputed dimension; this gate blocks promotion of any body-length value as canonical until measured

required_evidence: Shop-reviewed DXF or STEP derived from measured bore ID body length hole schedule and reed seat with all preceding gates cleared
notes: No fabrication-authority DXF exists for the duduk body; OpenSCAD smoke artifact in cad/ is a smoke starter not authority
